commands.repair_reason: Human review is needed because this protected PR has insufficient real behavior proof plus security-boundary and Slack routing blockers.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete workflow security-boundary regression by running candidate checkout code in a live secret-bearing Mantis job.; Review finding: [P1] Keep the secret-bearing job on trusted harness code — .github/workflows/mantis-slack-desktop-smoke.ym... commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Slack live QA approval scenarios, a Mantis Slack desktop `--approval-checkpoints` path with screenshot artifact validation, workflow dispatch inputs, docs, and Slack-native plugin approval routing changes.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers by source inspection and prepared proof: checkpoint mode does not prepare Slack credentials before the browser opens, and the recording stays on Slack sign-in. I did not run live Slack in this read-only review.
